feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

entry.title: Has anyone experience with within a month go-live for a S/4HANA migration? I need some advices.
entry.content:
We are about to plan the Go-Live for our S/4HANA Greenfield implementation project.

The plan is to use a public holiday + weekend to go live. This should happen withing the month. Which risks are you seeing here? Can you provide me with some advices?

Many Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Financial document is not replicated in sales order item
entry.content:
Hi Experts

When new items are added to the sales order from the contract, the financial document number recorded in the sales order header is not replicated in the new items.

What is required is that the new items inherit the financial document number that is recorded in the sales order header.

Please let me know how I can solve this problem

entry.title: ECC to S/4HANA Material Types
entry.content:
Material Types when moving to S/4

The company I work for currently have ECC6 on Prem and are in the processes of moving to S/4HANA with a finance greenfield implementation in release 1 with brownfield migration for everything else.  We are then looking to do SAP IBP in R2.

Problem is a lot of the material codes are setup as HAWAs for some historical reasons about selling finished products intercompany.  I am trying to build a business case for them to reclassify the materials during the migration to correctly use FERTs with QS based costing etc.  Same for the rest of the material types currently being used as a HAWA (HALBs, ROH etc)

Has anyone had experience with this. We are factoring this into the cost of the implementation so i'm keen to get any value add as well as any showstoppers for IBP, PLM, MDG etc

SAP S/4HANA MM (Materials Management) SAP Integrated Business Planning for sales and operations SAP Integrated Business Planning for inventory

entry.title: How to differentiate and integrate TM model based on Incoterms for the same type of purchase order
entry.content:
If we need TM model to manage third-party imported freight, how can we differentiate between third-party imported purchases and domestic purchases when both use the same purchase order type and the same purchase group, making it impossible to distinguish between them based on that criterion alone? Is it possible for the system standard functionality to differentiate the integration of TM based on Incoterms?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any way to skip an error on CVI Cockpit in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are executing CVI cockpit in S/4 HANA, then encounter some error of mismatch like some vendors and customers are not consolidated, because "name4" is not same as those vendors and customers.

My question is that is there any way to skip that error, then move to next step? Like those vendors and customers are remain unintegrated. I have an idea that archive and logical deletion, but it will take more time to do that, so skipping that error is desirable.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Is it possible to set the "Key User Rel. State" of a CDS-View to Released?
entry.content: I want to create a custom cds view to create an analysis with embedded Analytics. The problem is that I'm not able to add an existing cds view to "Data Sources" in the fiori app "Custom CDS Views". The reason seems to be the fact that my existing cds view has the "Key User Rel. State" set to not released. Is it possible to change it to "released"?

entry.title: Attachments uploaded to My Inbox does not get saved in backend
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have activated standard My Inbox application. However the upload and send email functionality doesnt work. 

The upload functionality gives a Message attachment is uploaded, however the attachments are not saved.If I refresh the view it goes away. I checked the network call, no call is going to backend either.

My Inbox version activated is 2.2.18.

Please help me with this issue

entry.title: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
Dear HANA Experts,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

I hope some Experts here in the HANA community can help me with this.

Thank you very much

BR Dominik

entry.title: How to use GOS attachment URL in CDS view
entry.content:
I want to use GOS attachment URL in CDS View.

However, URL attached in GOS is stored in SOFFCONT1 as binery data, so that it cannot be used directly.

1, Can I use Function Module in CDS View?
    CDS View is used by DataSphere, so maybe I cannot use Virtual Element.

2, Is there any table that store URL text as text data?

entry.title: Regarding Fiori App F3473_ Transport Request Management
entry.content:
We are unable to import a migration project into quality server. Unable to find any TR in the respective tile.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Final settlement still credit customer after accrual is reversed with REU1 Rebate Unlikelihood
entry.content:
The scenario is that the customer has failed to meet the rebate threshold, and we need to reverse the accruals and close the agreement. We have used the condition type REU1 (Rebate Unlikelihood) and run a delta accrual. The accruals that had been posted for the agreement have been correctly reversed.

However, if we run a final settlement a credit is passed to the customer account.The expectation is that no credit should be passed to the customer account since there is no accrual available for the customer.

Is there some config that we are missing or we have incorrect? We will have background jobs running so this is a risk that a credit is passed to the customer when it shouldn’t be posted.

entry.title: Error occured while settling the Asset AUC
entry.content: User wants to settle AUC. Settlement rules are defined in Tcode AIAB. But while settling in Tcode AIBU getting Message error: AA317- Check amount entered (Amount is too high).

entry.title: Inquiry About Table for Storing Email Addresses for SM37 Job Notifications
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for some clarification regarding a specific functionality in SAP. Specifically, I would like to know which table stores the email addresses that are used for sending notifications about job statuses in SM37.

If there are multiple tables or additional configurations involved, I would appreciate any detailed guidance or references.

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: SUM Run DMIS_CNT2011_1_731.SAR archive doesn’t exist
entry.content:
Good Day

I am running SUM in preparation of the upgrade from 1909 to 2023.

 

However, it fails because the DMIS_CNT2011_1_731.SAR archive doesn’t exist, its not being downloaded via the maintenance planner probably due to license or authorization issues.

entry.title: Hybrid landscape with RISE
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a customer with many ERP systems across the globe. He has currently more than 5 ECC systems that are  technically disparate and in different countries . He would like to go to S/4HANA with a greenfield approach and go to RISE with SAP . But for security reasons he can not put all his systems in the cloud and one system should remain on premises.

  He would like to keep the development and quality environment in RISE and most of pre-production and production in RISE, but one pre-production and one production would go on-premises (as described in the image). Do you know if it's possible to have an hybrid landscape, with most of the systems in RISE in different countries and some systems on-premises ? How the basis part (TOs, refreshes, upgrades...) is managed by SAP in such cases ?

entry.title: Notification creates into QMEL-PHASE field is not update
entry.content:
Hello,

We have recently transitioned to S/4 HANA and encountered an issue with the QMEL-PHASE field in notifications.

In the previous ECC system, this field was automatically updated :

1 Outstanding
2 Postponed
3 In Process
4 Completed
5 Deletion Flag

But in S/4 HANA, this field stay empty.

Have you the same problem, do i miss a new configuration?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Configuration in S/4HANA for mapping SAC Account type inSAC
entry.content:
While loading GL Account hierarchy from S/4HANA using C_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE_SRV I am not getting correct value of SAC Account type field. Could you let me know what configuration needs to be done in S/4HANA to ensure SAC Account type is properly updated in the CDS and Odata services.

 

Regards,

Iqubal

entry.title: A list with irreversible customizing in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dears,

Can you pls help me to find a list with irreversible customizing in S/4HANA?

I am much interested in MM, but would like to have a list of all.

Do you know if have such info provided by SAP?

BR,

Marina

entry.title: Good receipt : Error msg : account 6* requires an assignment to a CO object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm getting this error message "account 6* requires an assignment to a CO object" when posting good receipt, can you please tell me what can be the reason ? 

The purchase order contains only items without any specific assignment category (No account assignment Tab available on ME21N for this PO document type).

PO items contain materials that are linked to profit center in materials master data, the expense GL accounts are linked to cost centers by profit center via OKB9.

I don't understand why the system is not able to get the correct cost center through Material master data and OKB9, is it the fact that no assignment category is set on the PO items ?

 

Thank you for your help!

 

Thank you so much!

Regards
